hooks.command: sh -lc 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || { d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$d/AGENTS.md" ] && { echo "$d"; exit 0; }; d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; pwd; })"; python3 "$root/.codex/hooks/jsonl_logger.py"'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = (git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if (-not $root) { $dir = (Get-Location).Path; while ($dir -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $dir 'AGENTS.md'))) { $parent = Split-Path $dir -Parent; if ($parent -eq $dir) { break }; $dir = $parent }; $root = $dir }; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.codex/hooks/jsonl_logger.py')"
